name: my-project
description: Monorepo with mobile (Expo), web (Next.js) and shared logic — White Label

scripts.start:Default: node scripts/switch-client.mjs Default && cross-env CLIENT=Default pnpm --filter @my-project/mobile run dev -- --tunnel
scripts.start:Default:lan: node scripts/switch-client.mjs Default && cross-env CLIENT=Default pnpm --filter @my-project/mobile run dev -- --lan
scripts.start:Default:localhost: node scripts/switch-client.mjs Default && cross-env CLIENT=Default pnpm --filter @my-project/mobile run dev -- --localhost
scripts.start:web:Default: node scripts/switch-client.mjs Default && cross-env CLIENT=Default pnpm --filter @my-project/web run dev
